origin.rebirth: Ibn Sina returns in PersiaNexus as a guardian who combines ancient wisdom with future intelligence.

story.intro: When the universe faced a crisis of forgotten knowledge, the ancient library of Persia awakened and called back its greatest mind.
story.mission: Protect humanity by preserving knowledge and creating harmony between science, nature and cosmic energy.
story.enemy: The Void Machines that try to erase human intelligence and ancient wisdom.

powers.name: Infinite Knowledge
powers.description: Access to ancient and futuristic knowledge from multiple civilizations.

powers.name: Healing Light
powers.description: A mysterious energy that can restore life and repair damage.

powers.name: Quantum Intelligence
powers.description: Combines Persian wisdom with advanced artificial intelligence.

powers.name: Cosmic Vision
powers.description: Can analyze hidden patterns across time and space.

cinematic.theme: Mystic Persian music mixed with futuristic technology
cinematic.scene: In a futuristic Persian city, an ancient library opens. Ibn Sina appears surrounded by golden energy and activates the Nexus Crystal to fight the darkness.
